nasb.text: Also the ships of Hiram, which brought gold from Ophir, brought in from Ophir a very great number of almug trees and precious stones.

esv.text: Moreover, the fleet of Hiram, which brought gold from Ophir, brought from Ophir a very great amount of almug wood and precious stones.

cnv.text: 此外，從俄斐運金子來的希蘭船隊，又從俄斐運了大批檀香木和寶石來。

ccb.text: 希兰王的船只从俄斐运来黄金、大量的檀香木和宝石。
